hooks.command: gcd="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)"; root=""; case "$gcd" in */.git/modules/*|.git/modules/*) root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)" ;; /*) root="$(dirname "$gcd")" ;; *) root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || true)" ;; esac; [ -f "$root/.claude/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh" ] || root="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-}"; [ -f "$root/.claude/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh" ] || { printf 'BLOCKED: Policy hook unavailable: git repository root unavailable.\n' >&2; exit 2; }; cd "$root" || { printf 'BLOCKED: Policy hook unavailable: git repository root unavailable.\n' >&2; exit 2; }; bash "$root/.claude/hooks/deny-dangerous.sh"
